meta.title: How To Use Canva AI Video Generator (For YouTube Videos & Shorts)
meta.description:
How To Use Canva AI Video Generator (For YouTube Videos & Shorts)
Try it out on https://bit.ly/497wBL8

The new Canva AI video generator is simply amazing if you want to quickly edit your YouTube videos or YouTube shorts. With the magic studio functions you can import your videos and edit your videos by typing in a prompt. This prompt to video generator is a great option for anyone who doesn't have much experience with editing their videos.

For Inquiries: contactsoftwaresensei@gmail.com
